title: Ghastlings – Companion Souls
description: Ghastlings adds adorable Ghast Soul companions that orbit around you in battle. Capture them, power them up with elemental essences, and watch them fight alongside you with unique abilities!
body:
# **✨ Ghastlings**   > **A companion mod that lets you capture, customize, and command your own elemental Ghast Soul friends.** Ghastlings introduces a brand-new companion system to Minecraft. Capture ethereal Ghast Souls, infuse them with powerful elemental essences, and watch as they loyally orbit around you—ready to defend you with their unique abilities! ![image](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1414685/description_bb1acf4e-3a5f-4c34-8fe7-8530fce0a99e.png)    *** ## **🎯 What does this mod do?** Ever wanted a ghostly companion that fights by your side? One that floats behind you, reacts to enemies, and grows stronger over time? **Ghastlings** makes it happen. **__Capture. Infuse. Command.__**   *** ## **✨ Key Features**
👻Adorable Ghast Soul companions that follow you everywhere
⚔️9 unique elemental affinities with distinct combat abilities
📈Level-up system (1-5) for stronger attacks and more health
💔Durability system—your soul can take damage and needs healing
✨Passive regeneration when resting in your inventory
🔧Soul Smithing Table for crafting and upgrading
🎒Dedicated companion slot in your inventory

 

*** ## **👻 Meet the Ghastlings** Collect all 9 elemental variants, each with their own unique style and power. ![image](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1414685/description_4e46a6d6-3bf6-43bc-bcdf-d40d097a33d1.gif) *** ### ⚒️ Soul Smithing Table The dedicated workstation for all Ghast Soul operations. Craft souls, infuse elements, and level up your companions. ![image](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1414685/description_c70adddb-3055-4726-a81d-df8d189af8cd.gif)   *** ## **🔥 Elemental Affinities** Each Ghast Soul can be infused with a unique elemental essence: | Element |Ability |Essence Location | | ----------- |-------------------------------- |--------------------------------- | | 🔥 Fire |Shoots explosive fireballs |Bastions, Nether Fortress | | ⚡ Lightning |Summons lightning strikes |Trial Chambers, Buried Treasure | | 💚 Healing |Heals you when low on health |Witch Huts, Village Temples | | 💨 Wind |Launches wind charge projectiles |Trial Chambers | | 🧊 Ice |Freezes enemies with slowness |Igloos, Snow Villages | | ☠️ Poison |Inflicts poison on enemies |Jungle Temples, Pillager Outposts | | 💧 Water |Grants water breathing & speed |Ocean Ruins, Shipwrecks | | 💀 Wither |Applies wither effect |Wither Skeletons | | 🟣 Ender |Fires homing shulker bullets |End Cities | ![image](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1414685/description_0fb638dc-7f5c-43e1-a0a0-508d88a6fe6f.gif)   *** ## **📈 Level System** Your Ghast Soul grows stronger with each level: | Level |Powered Soul HP |Damage Multiplier | | ----------------------------------------------------------------- |--------------- |----------------- | | ⭐ Level 1 |20 HP |1.0x | | ⭐⭐ Level 2 |25 HP |1.1x | | ⭐⭐⭐ Level 3 |30 HP |1.2x | | ⭐⭐⭐⭐ Level 4 |35 HP |1.3x | | ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ Level 5 |40 HP |1.5x | | Upgrade your souls using Soul Essence in the Soul Smithing Table! | | | ![image](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1414685/description_1776eda6-1263-461d-9a20-92754e9163e7.gif)   *** ## **💔 Durability System** Your Ghast Soul isn't invincible! When equipped, your companion can take damage from enemies:
📊Durability bar shows current health
🟢→🟡→🔴Color changes from green to red as health drops
💀If health reaches 0, the soul dies and the item is destroyed
🩹Unequipped souls heal 1 HP every 30 seconds
⚒️Soul Smithing Table requires 100% health to upgrade

 

  *** ## **🔍 Category Details** ### 👹 Soul Keepers & Soul Shards In the depths of the **Soul Sand Valley**, mysterious **Soul Keepers** roam the foggy wasteland. Defeat them to obtain **Soul Shards**—a rare material essential for capturing Ghast Souls! ![image](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1414685/description_5cdcfa6d-104a-4b7d-9779-c94290e096a0.png)   *** ## **🎮 Compatibility**
  
Minecraft1.21.11
Mod LoaderFabric
RequiresFabric API

 

*** ## **📥 Installation** 1. Download and install [Fabric Loader](https://fabricmc.net/) 2. Download [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) 3. Download **Ghastlings** 4. Place both `.jar` files in your `mods` folder 5. Done!   *** ## **❓ FAQ** **How do I get my first Ghast Soul?** > Craft a Soul Vessel, then combine it with a Dried Ghast in the Soul Smithing Table. **How do I get Soul Crystal?** > Smelt Soul Sand in a furnace to obtain Soul Crystal. **How do I level up my Ghast Soul?** > Craft Soul Essence using Soul Shards + Soul Crystal, then combine it with your soul in the Soul Smithing Table. **Can my Ghast Soul die permanently?** > Yes! If its health reaches 0, the item is destroyed. Keep it safe! **Does it work on servers?** > Yes. It's a server-side mod that syncs with clients. **Is it compatible with other mods?** > Yes, it should work with most mods. It uses its own custom systems. > >   *** > _"Even the smallest ghost can have the biggest heart."_ ***   **Version:** 0.1 **Developer:** © 2025 Shamy\]™ Creative Studio **License:** CC0-1.0
